title: Kingez341YT PvP Pack
description:
⚔️ Kingez341YT PvP Mix — Clean PvP texture pack with short swords, small totem, low fire, outlined ores & crisp HUD for better fights. Made for sweaty PvP. Subscribe to Kingez341YT! 🎮

body:
Kingez341YT PvP Mix is a clean PvP texture pack made for the YouTuber Kingez341YT.

The pack is built for Minecraft 1.21+ and focuses on making PvP easier to see without taking away the normal Minecraft feel. It keeps the game looking familiar while improving the items, UI, particles, and small details that matter during combat.

What’s included:

* Short retextured swords
* Custom mace texture with improved size
* Mace, trident, wind charge, and ender pearl animations
* Small Totem of Undying
* Low fire for better visibility
* Custom font
* Cleaned-up GUI and HUD
* Outlined ores
* Updated XP bottle texture
* PvP item tweaks
* Improved particles
* No totem pop particles
* Cleaner combat visuals
* Better overall pack polish

This pack is made for players who want smoother PvP, less screen clutter, and clearer visuals during fights. It works well for survival, servers, crystal PvP, and normal PvP.

Made for Kingez341YT.
Subscribe to Kingez341YT on YouTube if you enjoy the pack.
